productDisplayName: Little Miss Intimates Black & White Pyjama Set
description: Style NoteWe love this cute pyjama set from little miss intimates which has a girly vibe and keeps you feeling young. Bright colours with cartoon prints, immensely comfortable and super soft fabric makes this just what you want to go to to sleep in or spend a day lounging at home. Product DetailsBlack spaghetti top, has a grey and black printed binding around the arm holes and straps, graphic print on the chest, contrast red stitched detail at the hem and neckline. White printed shorts with elasticated waist and tag-less comfortMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach or tumble dry or iron on print
